arts.sum: I know at Middlesbrough away that happens to a lot of teams, not just us, but we have to be more aggressive in terms of the high press so we can be in the opponents' half. I could see what we wanted to do in terms of how we occupy spaces, how we organise ourselves defensively and offensively.
